act-removedLabel: Lebo imeondolewa __label__ kutoka kwa kadi __card__ kwenye orodha __list__ kwenye swimlane __swimlane__ kwenye ubao __board__

act-addChecklistItem: imeongeza kipengee cha orodha tiki __checklistItem__ kwenye orodha tiki __checklist__ kwenye kadi __card__ kwenye orodha __list__ kwenye swimlane __swimlane__ ubaoni __board__

act-removeChecklistItem: umeondoa kipengee cha orodha tiki __checklistItem__ kutoka kwa orodha tiki __checkList__ kwenye kadi __card__ kwenye orodha __list__ kwenye swimlane __swimlane__ ubaoni __board__
act-checkedItem: imechaguliwa __checklistItem__ ya orodha tiki __checklist__ kwenye kadi __card__ kwenye orodha __list__ kwenye swimlane __swimlane__ kwenye ubao __board__

act-uncompleteChecklist: orodha hakiki ambayo haijakamilika __checklist__ kwenye kadi __card__ kwenye orodha __list__ kwenye swimlane __swimlane__ kwenye ubao __board__

act-archivedList: Orodha ya __list__ kwa swimlane __swimlane__ kwenye ubao __board__ imehamishwa hadi kwenye Kumbukumbu
act-archivedSwimlane: Swimlane __swimlane__ kwenye ubao __board__ imehamishwa hadi kwenye Kumbukumbu

act-importList: orodha iliyoingizwa __list__ kwa kuogelea __swimlane__ kwenye ubao __board__

list-width-error-message: List width must be an integer greater than 270
list-width-shared-note: This width is shared with everyone on this board.
list-width-personal-note: This width is only for you.
personal-list-width-description: When on, each user keeps their own list widths. When off, list widths are shared with everyone on the board.
click-to-enable-fixed-list-width: Same width for all lists disabled. Click to enable.
click-to-disable-fixed-list-width: Same width for all lists enabled. Click to disable.
fixed-list-width-note: When on, all lists have the same width, and resizing one list resizes all lists. This setting is only for you.

keyboard-shortcuts-disabled: Njia za mkato za kibodi zimezimwa. Bofya ili kuwezesha.

admin-desc: Inaweza kuangalia na kuhariri kadi, kuondoa washiriki na kubadilisha mipangilio ya bodi. Inaweza kutazama shughuli.
app-is-offline: Inapakia, tafadhali subiri. Kuonyesha upya ukurasa kutasababisha kupoteza data. Ikiwa upakiaji haufanyi kazi, tafadhali angalia kuwa seva haijasimama.

archiveBoardPopup-title: Ungependa kuhamisha Ubao hadi kwenye Kumbukumbu?

board-open-and-move-between-remaining-an: Bofya ili kufungua ubao. Tumia mpini wa kuburuta kukabidhi ubao kwa __workspaces__ (dondosha kwenye nafasi ya kazi kwenye utepe).

card-delete-suggest-archive: Unaweza kuhamishia kadi kwenye Kumbukumbu ili kuiondoa kwenye ubao na kuhifadhi shughuli.
card-archive-pop: Kadi haitaonekana kwenye orodha hii baada ya kuweka kadi kwenye kumbukumbu.

list-archive-pop: Orodha haitaonekana kwenye ubao baada ya kuhifadhi kwenye kumbukumbu.
list-archive-suggest: Baadaye unaweza kurejesha orodha kutoka kwenye Kumbukumbu katika Mipangilio ya Bodi.

swimlane-archive-suggest: Baadaye unaweza kurejesha njia ya kuogelea kutoka kwenye Kumbukumbu katika Mipangilio ya Bodi.

click-to-star: Bofya ili kuweka nyota kwenye ubao huu.
click-to-unstar: Bofya ili kuondoa nyota kwenye ubao huu.

click-to-disable-auto-width: Upana wa orodha otomatiki umewezeshwa. Bofya ili kuzima.

comment-assigned-only-desc: Kadi zilizokabidhiwa pekee ndizo zinazoonekana. Anaweza kutoa maoni pekee.

read-assigned-only-desc: Kadi zilizokabidhiwa pekee ndizo zinazoonekana. Haiwezi kuhariri.

copy-text-to-clipboard: Nakili maandishi kwenye ubao wa kunakili

custom-field-delete-pop: Hakuna kutendua. Hii itaondoa uga huu maalum kutoka kwa kadi zote na kuharibu historia yake.
custom-field-dropdown-options-placeholde: Bonyeza enter ili kuongeza chaguo zaidi

error-board-notAdmin: Unahitaji kuwa msimamizi wa bodi hii kufanya hivyo
error-board-notAMember: Unahitaji kuwa mwanachama wa bodi hii kufanya hivyo
error-notAllowed: Your board role is not allowed to do that
error-json-schema: Data yako ya JSON haijumuishi maelezo sahihi katika umbizo sahihi
error-csv-schema: CSV(Thamani Zilizotenganishwa kwa Koma)/TSV (Thamani Zilizotenganishwa na Kichupo) haijumuishi taarifa sahihi katika umbizo sahihi.
error-import-empty-board: This export contains no board content (no swimlanes, lists or cards). It may have been created by an older WeKan version with a known export bug. Please re-export the board with the current version and import the new file.
error-username-taken: Jina hili la mtumiaji tayari limechukuliwa
error-orgname-taken: Jina la shirika hili tayari limechukuliwa
error-teamname-taken: Jina la timu hii tayari limechukuliwa
export-card-excel-fields: Chagua sehemu za kujumuisha katika usafirishaji wa Excel:
export-card-excel-no-disk-space: Haiwezi kuhamisha kwa Excel: hakuna nafasi ya kutosha ya diski
user-can-not-export-card-to-pdf: Mtumiaji hawezi kuhamisha kadi kwa PDF
user-can-not-export-card-to-excel: Mtumiaji hawezi kuhamisha kadi kwa Excel
filter-on-desc: Unachuja kadi kwenye ubao huu. Bofya hapa ili kuhariri kichujio.
advanced-filter-description: Kichujio cha Kina huruhusu kuandika mfuatano ulio na waendeshaji wafuatao: == != <= >= && || () Nafasi hutumika kama kitenganishi kati ya Waendeshaji. Unaweza kuchuja Sehemu zote Maalum kwa kuandika majina na thamani zake. Kwa Mfano: Sehemu1 == Thamani1. Kumbuka: Ikiwa sehemu au thamani zina nafasi, unahitaji kuziweka katika nukuu moja. Kwa Mfano: 'Field 1' == 'Thamani 1'. Kwa herufi moja za udhibiti (' \/) kurukwa, unaweza kutumia \. Kwa mfano: Field1 == I\'m. Pia unaweza kuchanganya hali nyingi. Kwa Mfano: F1 == V1 || F1 == V2. Kwa kawaida waendeshaji wote hufasiriwa kutoka kushoto kwenda kulia. Unaweza kubadilisha mpangilio kwa kuweka mabano. Kwa Mfano: F1 == V1 && ( F2 == V2 || F2 == V3 ). Pia unaweza kutafuta sehemu za maandishi kwa kutumia regex: F1 == /Tes.*/i
header-logo-title: Rudi kwenye ukurasa wa bodi zako.
import-board-instruction-kanboard: Paste a Kanboard export JSON: an object with "columns" (or tasks carrying column_name) and a "tasks" array (title, description, column_name, swimlane_name, date_due, owner, tags). Columns become lists and tasks become cards.
import-board-instruction-deck: Paste a NextCloud Deck board JSON (a board with "stacks", each stack carrying its "cards"). Stacks become lists and cards become cards.
import-board-instruction-openproject: Paste an OpenProject work-packages collection JSON (GET /api/v3/work_packages). Statuses become lists and work packages become cards.
import-board-instruction-issues: Paste a __sourceName__ issues JSON array (__endpoint__). Issues become cards grouped into Open / Closed lists.
import-board-instruction-asana: Paste an Asana tasks export JSON ({ "data": [...] } from the Asana export or GET /tasks). Tasks are grouped into sections (memberships); completed tasks go to Done.
import-board-instruction-zenkit: Paste a ZenKit list export JSON ({ "title", "stages":[...], "items":[...] }). Stages become lists and items become cards.
import-board-instruction-trello: Katika ubao wako wa Trello, nenda kwenye 'Menyu', kisha 'Zaidi', 'Chapisha na Hamisha', 'Hamisha JSON', na unakili maandishi yanayotokana.
import-board-instruction-csv: Bandika katika Thamani Zilizotenganishwa na Koma(CSV)/ Thamani Zilizotenganishwa za Kichupo (TSV) .
import-board-instruction-jira: Paste the JSON from the Jira Cloud REST API issue search (GET /rest/api/2/search), or an equivalent { "issues": [...] } object. Jira statuses become lists and issues become cards. Optionally include an "automationRules" array to import rules.
import-board-instruction-excel: Choose a WeKan-style .xlsx spreadsheet (the same columns as the Excel export: Title, Description, Status/List, Members, Labels, dates, custom fields). The first row is the header.
import-board-instruction-wekan: Katika ubao wako, nenda kwa 'Menyu', kisha 'Hamisha ubao', na unakili maandishi katika faili iliyopakuliwa.
import-board-instruction-about-errors: Ukipata hitilafu wakati wa kuingiza bodi, wakati mwingine kuagiza bado kunafanya kazi, na ubao uko kwenye ukurasa wa Bodi Zote.
import-json-placeholder: Bandika data yako halali ya JSON hapa
import-csv-placeholder: Bandika data yako halali ya CSV/TSV hapa
import-json-file: Or select a Trello JSON file
import-attachments-zip: Trello attachments ZIP (optional, from Trello Card Attachments Downloader)
import-trello-json-file-hint: One Trello board exported as .json. If you have saved Trello API key and token, its attachments, board background and member avatars are downloaded too.
import-trello-zip-file-hint: A .zip with one or more board .json files and their attachments in board-name subfolders (from the Trello Card Attachments Downloader). All boards are imported.
import-trello-zip-no-boards: No Trello board .json files were found in the .zip.
import-trello-zip-too-large: The .zip is too large to import.
import-trello-zip-too-many-files: The .zip has too many files to import.
import-trello-zip-file-too-large: A file inside the .zip is too large to import.
import-trello-zip-unsafe-path: The .zip contains unsafe file paths and was rejected.
import-trello-workspace-placeholder: Imported board is placed under this workspace, created if it does not exist
trello-api-import: Import directly from Trello with API key and token
trello-api-import-desc: Paste your Trello API key and token to list your Trello workspaces and boards, then import the selected ones with their attachments.
trello-api-token: Trello API token (manually generated below the API key)
trello-api-credentials-required: Please enter both the Trello API key and token.
trello-api-credentials-saved: Trello API key and token are saved. You can list workspaces without re-entering them.
trello-select-boards: Please select at least one board to import.
trello-cancel-delete-confirm: Cancel the import and delete the boards already imported by this job? This cannot be undone.
import-members-map: Bodi yako iliyoingizwa ina baadhi ya wanachama. Tafadhali panga washiriki unaotaka kuleta kwa watumiaji wako
import-members-map-note: Kumbuka: Wanachama ambao hawajaorodheshwa watakabidhiwa kwa mtumiaji wa sasa.
import-user-select: Chagua mtumiaji wako aliyepo ambaye ungependa kumtumia kama mwanachama huyu
label-delete-pop: Hakuna kutendua. Hii itaondoa lebo hii kwenye kadi zote na kuharibu historia yake.
last-admin-desc: Huwezi kubadilisha majukumu kwa sababu lazima kuwe na angalau msimamizi mmoja.
leave-board-pop: Je, una uhakika unataka kuondoka __boardTitle__? Utaondolewa kwenye kadi zote kwenye ubao huu.
list-archive-cards: Hamisha kadi zote kwenye orodha hii hadi kwenye Kumbukumbu
list-archive-cards-pop: Hii itaondoa kadi zote kwenye orodha hii kwenye ubao. Ili kutazama kadi katika Kumbukumbu na kuzirejesha kwenye ubao, bofya "Menyu"> "Hifadhi Kumbukumbu".
list-move-cards: Hamisha kadi zote kwenye orodha hii
list-select-cards: Chagua kadi zote kwenye orodha hii
list-delete-pop: Vitendo vyote vitaondolewa kwenye mipasho ya shughuli na hutaweza kurejesha orodha. Hakuna kutendua.
list-delete-suggest-archive: Unaweza kuhamisha orodha kwenye Kumbukumbu ili kuiondoa kwenye ubao na kuhifadhi shughuli.
multi-selection-member: Weka mwanachama kwa ajili ya uteuzi
muted-info: Hutawahi kuarifiwa kuhusu mabadiliko yoyote katika bodi hii
name: Jina
no-archived-swimlanes: Hakuna njia za kuogelea kwenye Kumbukumbu.
normal-desc: Inaweza kutazama na kuhariri kadi. Haiwezi kubadilisha mipangilio.
normal-assigned-only-desc: Kadi zilizokabidhiwa pekee ndizo zinazoonekana. Hariri kama Mtumiaji wa Kawaida.
notify-participate: Pokea masasisho kwa kadi zozote unazoshiriki kama mtayarishi au mwanachama
notify-watch: Pokea masasisho kwa bodi, orodha au kadi zozote unazotazama
page-maybe-private: Ukurasa huu unaweza kuwa wa faragha. Unaweza kuiona kwa kuingia.
paste-or-dragdrop: kubandika, au kuburuta na kudondosha faili ya picha kwake (picha pekee)
private-desc: Bodi hii ni ya kibinafsi. Watu walioongezwa kwenye ubao pekee ndio wanaoweza kuitazama na kuihariri.
public-desc: Bodi hii ni ya umma. Inaonekana kwa mtu yeyote aliye na kiungo na itaonekana katika injini za utafutaji kama vile Google. Watu walioongezwa kwenye ubao pekee ndio wanaoweza kuhariri.
quick-access-description: Weka nyota kwenye ubao ili kuongeza njia ya mkato kwenye upau huu.
remove-cover: Ondoa picha ya jalada kutoka kwa kadi ndogo
remove-member-pop: Ondoa __name__ (__username__) kutoka kwa __boardTitle__? Mwanachama ataondolewa kwenye kadi zote kwenye ubao huu. Watapokea arifa.
rescue-card-description: Onyesha mazungumzo ya uokoaji kabla ya kufunga kwa maelezo ya kadi ambayo hayajahifadhiwa
rescue-card-description-dialogue: Je, ungependa kufuta maelezo ya kadi ya sasa na mabadiliko yako?

operator-limit-invalid: %s sio kikomo halali.  Kikomo kinapaswa kuwa nambari chanya.
globalSearch-instructions-description: Utafutaji unaweza kujumuisha waendeshaji ili kuboresha utafutaji.  Waendeshaji hubainishwa kwa kuandika jina la opereta na thamani iliyotenganishwa na koloni.  Kwa mfano, maelezo ya opereta ya `list:Blocked` yangewekea kikomo utafutaji kwa kadi zilizomo kwenye orodha iitwayo *Imezuiwa*.  Ikiwa thamani ina nafasi au vibambo maalum ni lazima iwekwe katika alama za nukuu (k.m. `__operator_list__:"To Review"`).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-swiml: `__operator_swimlane__:<title>` - ​​kadi katika maeneo ya kuogelea zinazolingana na maalum *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-label: `__operator_label__:<color>` `__operator_label__:<name>` - kadi ambazo zina lebo inayolingana *<color>* au *<name>
globalSearch-instructions-operator-org: `__operator_org__:<display name|short name>` - ​​kadi za bodi iliyopewa shirika *<name>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-team: `__operator_team__:<display name|short name>` - ​​kadi za bodi iliyopewa timu *<name>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-due: `__operator_due__:<n>` - ​​kadi ambazo zinafaa kulipa hadi siku *<n>* kutoka sasa.  `__operator_due__:__predicate_overdue__ huorodhesha kadi zote baada ya tarehe yake ya kukamilika.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-creat: `__operator_created__:<n>` - ​​kadi ambazo ziliundwa *<n>* siku chache zilizopita au chache zilizopita
globalSearch-instructions-operator-modif: `__operator_modified__:<n>` - ​​kadi ambazo zilirekebishwa *<n>* siku chache zilizopita au chache zilizopita
globalSearch-instructions-status-all: `__predicate_all__` - ​​kadi zote zilizohifadhiwa na zisizohifadhiwa kwenye kumbukumbu
globalSearch-instructions-operator-has: `__operator_has__:<field>` - ​​ambapo *<field>* ni mmoja wa `__predicate_attachment__`, `__predicate_checklist__`, `__predicate_description__`, `__predicate_start__`, `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_end__`, `__predicate_assignee__` au `__predicate_member__`.  Kuweka `-` mbele ya *<field>* hutafuta kukosekana kwa thamani katika sehemu hiyo (k.m. `has:-due` hutafuta kadi bila tarehe ya kukamilika).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-sort: `__operator_sort__:<sort-name>` - ​​ambapo *<sort-name>* ni mojawapo ya `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_created__` au `__predicate_modified__`.  Kwa aina ya kushuka, weka `-` mbele ya jina la kupanga.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-limit: `__operator_limit__:<n>` - ​​ambapo *<n>* ni nambari kamili inayoonyesha idadi ya kadi zitakazoonyeshwa kwa kila ukurasa.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-2:
Waendeshaji sawia wako *OR* pamoja.  Kadi zinazolingana na masharti yoyote zitarejeshwa.
`__operator_list__:Available __operator_list__:Blocked` atarejesha kadi zilizo katika orodha yoyote inayoitwa *Imezuiwa* au *Inayopatikana*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3: Waendeshaji tofauti wako *NA* pamoja.  Kadi zinazolingana na waendeshaji wote tofauti ndizo pekee ndizo zinazorudishwa.  `__operator_list__:Available __operator_label__:red` hurejesha pekee kadi katika orodha *Inayopatikana* yenye lebo *nyekundu*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3-2: Siku zinaweza kubainishwa kama nambari kamili chanya au hasi au kwa kutumia `__predicate_week__`, `__predicate_month__`, `__predicate_quarter__` au `__predicate_year__` kwa kipindi cha sasa.

server-error-troubleshooting:
Tafadhali wasilisha hitilafu iliyotolewa na seva.
Kwa usakinishaji wa haraka, endesha: `sudo snap logs wekan.wekan`
Kwa usakinishaji wa Docker, endesha: `sudo docker logs wekan-app`

attachment-repair-locations-description: Find attachments and avatars whose recorded storage (filesystem / GridFS / cloud) no longer matches where the file is, and fix the database to point at the real location.
default-save-storage-description: Choose the storage backend where newly uploaded attachments are saved.
mongodb-compact-description: After moving files out of MongoDB GridFS, the database file on disk does not shrink automatically. Running Compact reclaims freed space by rewriting the collection data. Only run this after bulk file moves are complete.
mongodb-compact-warning: Warning: Compact is a blocking operation that may take several minutes on large databases. On replica sets, all secondaries are compacted first (automatically), then the primary. On single-node replica sets used for oplog (common Meteor setup), only the primary is compacted.
mongodb-compact-running: Running compact, this may take several minutes...

board-archive-scheduled: Kumbukumbu ya bodi imeratibiwa kwa mafanikio

cron-job-delete-confirm: Je, una uhakika unataka kufuta kazi hii iliyoratibiwa?
filesystem-path-description: Njia ya msingi ya kuhifadhi faili
filesystem-enabled-description: Use local filesystem for file storage
s3-minio-storage-description: S3-compatible object storage: AWS S3, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Wasabi, DigitalOcean Spaces and others.
s3-force-path-style-description: Required by MinIO and most non-AWS S3-compatible servers.
azure-connection-string-description: Optional: use a full connection string instead of account name and key.
gcs-key-filename-description: Optional: path to a service account JSON key file on the server.
gcs-credentials-description: Optional: paste the service account JSON key. Leave blank to use the key file or default credentials.
gcs-permissions-note: Give WeKan's service account read/write access to the bucket: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → your bucket → Permissions → Grant access. In "New principals", paste the service account email — the "client_email" value from your JSON key — then choose the role "Storage Object Admin" and Save.
cloud-secret-keep-blank: Leave blank to keep the current value.
azure-account-name-description: The name of your Azure Storage account.
azure-container-description: The blob container to store files in.
gcs-bucket-description: The name of the Cloud Storage bucket to store files in.
s3-endpoint-menu-path: AWS: leave blank (uses the region endpoint). S3-compatible: the Endpoint URL from your MinIO / Cloudflare R2 / Backblaze B2 / Wasabi / DigitalOcean Spaces console.
s3-region-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → your bucket → Properties → AWS Region.
s3-bucket-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → your bucket name (or Create bucket → Bucket name).
s3-access-key-menu-path: AWS Console → IAM → Users → your user → Security credentials → Access keys → Create access key → choose use case 'Application running outside AWS' → Create access key. Shown as 'Access key ID'.
s3-secret-key-menu-path: Same screen as the Access key ID; 'Secret access key' is shown only once when the key is created — copy it then (or Download .csv).
azure-account-name-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → name shown at the top (also under Security + networking → Access keys → Storage account name).
azure-account-key-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Show → Key.
azure-connection-string-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Connection string → Show.
azure-container-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Data storage → Containers → your container (or + Container to create one).
gcs-project-id-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → project selector at the top → your project's ID (Cloud overview → Dashboard → Project info → Project ID).
gcs-bucket-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → your bucket name (or Create to make one).
gcs-key-filename-menu-path: Path on the WeKan server to the downloaded service account JSON key file (created below). Use this OR paste the JSON into the field below.
gcs-credentials-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service accounts → your service account → Keys → Add key → Create new key → JSON → Create (downloads the file). Paste its contents here, or save the file and set its path above.
attachment-move-storage-azure: Move attachment to Azure Blob Storage
attachment-move-storage-gcs: Move attachment to Google Cloud Storage
gridfs-enabled-description: Tumia MongoDB GridFS kwa kuhifadhi faili
migration-stop-confirm: Je, una uhakika unataka kukomesha uhamaji wote?
gridfs-move-collectionfs-note: To have attachments and avatars visible, move them from CollectionFS to any other Storage.
s3-access-key-description: Kitufe cha ufikiaji cha AWS S3 kwa uthibitishaji
s3-access-key-placeholder: Ingiza ufunguo wa ufikiaji wa S3
s3-bucket-description: Jina la ndoo la S3 la kuhifadhi faili
s3-enabled-description: Tumia AWS S3 au MinIO kuhifadhi faili
s3-endpoint-description: URL ya mwisho ya S3 (k.m., s3.amazonaws.com au minio.example.com)
s3-port-description: Nambari ya bandari ya mwisho ya S3
s3-secret-key-description: Kitufe cha siri cha AWS S3 kwa uthibitishaji
s3-secret-key-placeholder: Ingiza ufunguo wa siri wa S3
s3-secret-key-required: Ufunguo wa siri wa S3 unahitajika
s3-ssl-enabled-description: Tumia SSL/TLS kwa miunganisho ya S3
writable-path-description: Njia ya saraka ya msingi kwa uhifadhi wa faili
comprehensive-board-migration-descriptio: Hufanya ukaguzi na marekebisho ya kina kwa uadilifu wa data ya bodi, ikijumuisha kuagiza orodha, nafasi za kadi na muundo wa swimlane.
delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migration-d: Hufuta orodha tupu zilizorudiwa kwa usalama. Huondoa tu orodha ambazo hazina kadi NA kuwa na orodha nyingine yenye kichwa sawa na ambacho kina kadi.
restore-lost-cards-migration-description: Hupata na kurejesha kadi na orodha zisizo na swimlaneId au listId. Huunda njia ya kuogelea ya 'Kadi Zilizopotea' ili kufanya vitu vyote vilivyopotea vionekane tena.
restore-all-archived-migration-descripti: Hurejesha swimlanes zilizohifadhiwa kwenye kumbukumbu, orodha na kadi. Hurekebisha kiotomatiki swimlaneId yoyote inayokosekana au listId ili kufanya vipengee vionekane.
fix-missing-lists-migration-description: Inagundua na kurekebisha orodha ambazo hazipo au mbovu katika muundo wa bodi.
fix-avatar-urls-migration-description: Husasisha URL za avatar ili washiriki wa bodi kutumia mazingira sahihi ya hifadhi na kurekebisha marejeleo ya avatar yaliyoharibika.
fix-all-file-urls-migration-description: Husasisha URL zote za viambatisho vya faili kwenye ubao huu ili kutumia mandharinyuma sahihi ya hifadhi na kurekebisha marejeleo ya faili yaliyovunjika.
migrations-admin-only: Wasimamizi wa bodi pekee ndio wanaweza kuendesha uhamishaji
migrations-description: Fanya ukaguzi na urekebishaji wa uadilifu wa data kwa bodi hii. Kila uhamiaji unaweza kutekelezwa mmoja mmoja.
run-comprehensive-migration-confirm: Hii itafanya uhamishaji wa kina ili kuangalia na kurekebisha uadilifu wa data ya bodi. Hii inaweza kuchukua muda mfupi. Ungependa kuendelea?
run-delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migrati: Hii itabadilisha kwanza orodha zozote zinazoshirikiwa kuwa orodha za kila mtu anayeogelea, kisha kufuta orodha tupu ambazo zina nakala ya orodha iliyo na kichwa sawa kilicho na kadi. Orodha tupu zisizo na maana pekee ndizo zitaondolewa. Ungependa kuendelea?
run-restore-lost-cards-migration-confirm: Hii itaunda njia ya kuogelea ya 'Kadi Zilizopotea' na kurejesha kadi na orodha zote zisizo na kitambulisho cha kuogelea au listId. Hii inathiri tu vipengee ambavyo havijahifadhiwa kwenye kumbukumbu. Ungependa kuendelea?
run-restore-all-archived-migration-confi: Hii itarejesha swimlanes, orodha na kadi ZOTE zilizohifadhiwa kwenye kumbukumbu, na kuzifanya zionekane tena. Vipengee vyovyote vilivyo na vitambulisho vinavyokosekana vitarekebishwa kiotomatiki. Hili haliwezi kutenduliwa kwa urahisi. Ungependa kuendelea?
run-fix-missing-lists-migration-confirm: Hii itagundua na kurekebisha orodha zinazokosekana au mbovu katika muundo wa bodi. Ungependa kuendelea?
run-fix-avatar-urls-migration-confirm: Hii itasasisha URL za avatar kwa wanachama wa bodi ili kutumia mazingira sahihi ya hifadhi. Ungependa kuendelea?
run-fix-all-file-urls-migration-confirm: Hii itasasisha URL zote za viambatisho vya faili kwenye ubao huu ili kutumia mazingira sahihi ya hifadhi. Ungependa kuendelea?
restore-lost-cards-nothing-to-restore: Hakuna swimlanes zilizopotea, orodha, au kadi za kurejesha
migration-progress-note: Tafadhali subiri tunapohamisha bodi yako hadi muundo mpya zaidi...
step-scan-users: Inaangalia avatars za wajumbe wa bodi
step-scan-files: Inaangalia viambatisho vya faili za ubao
conversion-info-text: Ugeuzaji huu unafanywa mara moja kwa kila ubao na kuboresha utendakazi. Unaweza kuendelea kutumia bodi kawaida.
converting-board-description: Kubadilisha muundo wa bodi kwa utendakazi ulioboreshwa. Hii inaweza kuchukua muda mfupi.
database-migration-description: Kusasisha muundo wa hifadhidata kwa utendakazi na utendaji ulioboreshwa. Mchakato huu unaweza kuchukua dakika kadhaa.
migrate-all-to-filesystem: Hamisha Zote kwa Mfumo wa Faili
migration-batch-size-description: Idadi ya viambatisho vya kuchakatwa katika kila kundi (1-100)
migration-cpu-threshold-description: Sitisha uhamishaji wakati matumizi ya CPU yanazidi asilimia hii (10-90)
migration-delay-ms-description: Kuchelewa kati ya bechi kwa milisekunde (100-10000)
migration-info-text: Uhamishaji wa hifadhidata hufanywa mara moja na kuboresha utendaji wa mfumo. Mchakato unaendelea chinichini hata ukifunga kivinjari chako.
migration-warning-text: Tafadhali usifunge kivinjari chako wakati wa kuhama. Mchakato utaendelea chinichini lakini inaweza kuchukua muda mrefu kukamilika.
monitoring-refresh-failed: Imeshindwa kuonyesha upya data ya ufuatiliaji
sign-in-to-upload: Ingia katika akaunti ili kupakia hazina
account-locked: Akaunti imefungwa kwa muda kwa sababu ya majaribio mengi sana ya kuingia ambayo hayakufaulu. Tafadhali jaribu tena baadaye.
invalid-credentials: Jina la mtumiaji au nenosiri batili
username-password-required: Jina la mtumiaji na nenosiri zinahitajika
username-too-short: Jina la mtumiaji lazima liwe na angalau vibambo 3
